brandDescription: A decentralized governance platform for the Cardano ecosystem that enables community-driven decision making through transparent voting and proposal systems.
termsOfService: By participating in Catalyst Community, you agree to follow our community guidelines and respect all participants. Proposals must align with Cardano's mission and values.
privacyPolicy: We collect minimal data necessary for governance participation. Your voting preferences and proposal submissions are stored securely and used only for governance purposes.
welcomeMessage: Welcome to Catalyst Community! Here you can submit proposals, vote on community initiatives, and help shape the future of Cardano.
proposalSubmissionSuccessMessage: Your proposal has been successfully submitted and is now under review. You will be notified of its status.
votingReminderMessage: Don't forget to vote on the current proposals! Your voice matters in shaping our community's future.
